creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Synopsis: comms/thebridge Update to 0.83

I'm sorry one file is insufficient.

--- pkg-plist.diff begins here ---
echo x - pkg-plist.diff
sed 's/^X//' >pkg-plist.diff << 'END-of-pkg-plist.diff'
X--- pkg-plist.orig	Sun Jun 27 22:56:53 2004
X+++ pkg-plist	Fri Sep 22 19:31:54 2006
X@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
X bin/tbdcmd
X-etc/rc.d/tbd.sh.sample
X etc/tbd.conf.sample
X libexec/tbd
END-of-pkg-plist.diff
exit
--- pkg-plist.diff ends here ---
